快3计划师群.【网：59FC·CC】【网：95FC·CC】【QQ：5075273】【网：35FC·CC】<浏览器手动输入网址>【首单返利50%】【来富彩，马上发】【富彩祝您】【鸿运当头好运来】【财源滚滚为您开】【精彩纷呈乐不停】【大奖小奖进家门】JINYUAN666《金源导师》<br>原文翻译及赏析_作者李白<br>青天有月来几时？我今停杯一问之。<br>人攀明月不可得，月行却与人相随。<br>皎如飞镜临丹阙，绿烟灭尽清辉发。<br>但见宵从海上来，宁知晓向云间没。<br>白兔捣药秋复春，嫦娥孤栖与谁邻？<br>今人不见古时月，今月曾经照古人。<br>古人今人若流水，共看明月皆如此。<br>唯愿当歌对酒时，月光长照金樽里。<br>[![66.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/SsTM0tXD/66.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/hzmjTs1d)<br>[![67.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/C1kx7PGg/67.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/CBM0L4rP)<br>[![68.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/NM6QmycS/68.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/r0p6LwzN)<br>[![82.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/4NNXHNSg/82.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/z3Ms95Nt)<br>[![83.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/DwRhNQy8/83.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/K17CkMT2)<br>[![84.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/1XWhrwj1/84.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/dZTxqkF5)<br>------------------<br>vk.com/topic-239041231_65179587<br>vk.com/topic-239046645_63433567<br>vk.com/topic-239046640_64602151<br>vk.com/topic-239046661_65179552<br>vk.com/topic-238969627_64959494<br>vk.com/topic-238994470_64602118<br>vk.com/topic-239000408_64025083<br>vk.com/topic-239046666_63858716<br>vk.com/topic-239043994_63511168<br>vk.com/topic-239046639_64296046<br>vk.com/topic-239046636_63858724<br>vk.com/topic-239046682_64124535<br>vk.com/topic-238949597_64959498<br>vk.com/topic-239046643_63715683<br>vk.com/topic-239046657_64959499<br>vk.com/topic-239046649_64296056<br>vk.com/topic-239046684_63511178<br>vk.com/topic-239046650_64602133<br>vk.com/topic-239046671_65179572<br>vk.com/topic-239046709_64296059<br>vk.com/topic-239046640_64602173<br>vk.com/topic-238932606_63858777<br>vk.com/topic-239046629_64296066<br>vk.com/topic-238994683_63715695<br>vk.com/topic-239046637_64959517<br>vk.com/topic-239046669_64296069<br>vk.com/topic-238969627_64959558<br>vk.com/topic-238998902_64124547<br>vk.com/topic-239046678_64025156<br>vk.com/topic-239046668_64025136<br>vk.com/topic-239046667_64959533<br>vk.com/topic-239024104_63511201<br>vk.com/topic-238932606_63858794<br>vk.com/topic
